channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: The Cloudward Crew Confers
item.description:
The crew of Dimension 20 chats about what it takes to bring the world of Cloudward, Ho! to life.

Duration: 1:09:54

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, derek christiansen, carlos luna, rick perry, michael schaubach, skye smith, denise valentine, jon wolf
